name: Semolina Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the semolina and all-purpose flour.
2. Gradually add up to 1/2 cup of water, stirring until the mixture holds together in a ball.
3. Cover the dough and let it rest for half an hour to an hour.
4. Divide the ball into quarters.
5. Roll each quarter through the machine at a time.
